projectDescription: A minimal, production-ready HTTP API starter built on Bun.serve with structured routing, rate limiting, request correlation, security headers, and consistent JSON responses.
keyFeatures: Zero-framework HTTP server using Bun.serve with standard Request/Response model
File-based modular routing under src/routes/<name>/ mounted at /api/v1/<name>
Per-route in-memory rate limiting via rate-limiter-flexible
Request correlation IDs via X-Request-ID / X-Correlation-ID headers and AsyncLocalStorage
Baseline security headers on every response (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.)
Per-route body size enforcement with Content-Length and stream-based limits
CORS middleware with configurable origin allowlist and preflight handling
Automatic gzip/br compression for JSON responses over 1 KiB
Zod-based input validation helpers for body, query, and path params
In-memory metrics tracking (request totals, duration, errors, rate limit hits)
Structured colorized logging with levels controlled by LOG_LEVEL env
publicApiSurface: apiSuccess(data?, init?) — Build a standard JSON success envelope
apiFailure(data?, init?) — Build a standard JSON failure envelope
log(level, message, ctx?) — Colorized structured logger
createRouteLimiter(config) — Create a per-route in-memory rate limiter
consumeOr429(req, server) — Consume a rate limit point or return HTTP 429
createRouteBodyLimit({ maxBytes }) — Create a per-route body size enforcer
checkBodySize(req) — Enforce the body size limit for a route
validateBody(schema, body) — Validate request body with Zod
validateQuery(schema, query) — Validate query parameters with Zod
validateParams(schema, params) — Validate route params with Zod
runWithRequestContext(req, fn) — Run handler with request-scoped AsyncLocalStorage
getCurrentRequestId() — Get the current request's correlation ID
mirrorRequestIdHeader(response) — Add X-Request-ID to response
runWithTrace(fn) — Run handler with distributed trace context
getTraceId() / getSpanId() / getTraceHeaders() — Access current trace context
getMetricsSnapshot() — Return current in-memory metrics
negotiateEncoding(acceptEncoding) — Parse Accept-Encoding header
compressResponse(body, encoding) — Compress a response body
getClientIp(req, server) — Resolve client IP with trusted-proxy support
getClientIpKey(req, server) — Get rate-limiter-safe client IP key
createCorsMiddleware() — Build a CORS middleware instance
mergeSecurityHeaders(response) — Apply baseline security headers
handleRequest(req, server) — Central request pipeline entry point
GET /api/v1/home — Sample home endpoint
GET /api/v1/health — Health check endpoint for Kubernetes/load balancers
